description_long: This house features a striking modern architectural design with sharp, angular lines and a low, horizontal profile. The structure is set on a sloped plot, with a prominent flat roof and multiple intersecting planes that create dynamic visual interest. The exterior appears to be clad in dark materials, contrasted by lighter trim and retaining walls that define the boundaries of the property. A single, tall tree is positioned near one corner, adding a natural accent to the otherwise geometric landscape. The house is surrounded by a terraced yard with minimal landscaping, and the windows are arranged asymmetrically, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The entryway is subtly integrated into the facade, with no prominent porch or steps visible, emphasizing clean lines and simplicity.
description: A modern, angular house with a flat roof, dark exterior, and asymmetrical window placement, set on a sloped lot with minimal landscaping. Light trim and retaining walls accentuate the geometric design.
description_view_0: From this side, the house's low profile and sloped terrain are most visible, with a single tall tree and light retaining wall accentuating the dark structure.
description_view_1: This view highlights the flat roof and the angular, layered planes of the house, with the retaining wall running along the base.
description_view_2: The rear or side view shows the asymmetrical window placement and the terraced yard, with the tree positioned near the corner.
description_view_3: From this angle, the intersecting planes and sharp angles of the house are prominent, with the sloped lot and minimal landscaping clearly visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist entryway integrated into the facade, with no prominent porch or steps, emphasizing clean lines and simplicity.
